title: Command Decorating Clips, Value Pack of 40 Mini Hooks and 48 Small Adhesive Strips, Transparent - Hanging Clips for Decorations and Fairy Lights, Wall Adhesive - Damage Free Hanging
features: LITTLE HELPERS: The attractive transparent design makes the hook almost invisible, perfect for hanging fairy-lights or small decorations on dark or striking surfaces and in much-used spaces such as living rooms, kitchens and hallways
NO TOOLS REQUIRED: Hang your lights and decorations where you want without nails or a hammer
DAMAGE-FREE DECORATING: Say goodbye to holes or sticky residue on your walls. Command Adhesive Strips by 3M are easy to use and help keep your walls looking beautiful without any marks

REMOVES CLEANLY: These decorating clips leave no sticky adhesive behind. Thanks to the Command stretch-release removable adhesive technology, they hold strongly yet you can remove them without leaving traces or glue residue

INCLUDES: The package contains 40 transparent clip hooks and 48 mini adhesive strips. You can hang up to 12 meters of lights, use 1 clip for every 30-60 cm of lights. Not suitable for hanging picture frames
A handy, damage-free solution for hanging fairy lights, bunting and other decorative items in your home or workplace
Simple, quick and easy to apply – no need for nails, screws or drawing pins
Clear hooks and clear adhesive strips are almost invisible when in use
Hold strongly but remove quickly and cleanly without leaving holes, marks, stains or sticky residue
Value pack contains 40 clips and 48 clear adhesive strips
